title: Awesome-Self-Evolving-Agents: A Comprehensive Survey of Self-Evolving AI Agents
snippet: Curated list accompanying the survey paper on self-evolving AI agents, bridging foundation models and lifelong agentic systems. 2001 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly curated awesome-list and survey companion for self-evolving AI agents, the exact topic.

title: EvoAgentX: Building a Self-Evolving Ecosystem of AI Agents
snippet: Open-source framework for building, evaluating, and evolving LLM-based agents or agentic workflows in an automated, modular, and goal-driven manner. Integrates TextGrad, AFlow, and MIPRO optimization algorithms. 2683 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Major open-source framework specifically designed for self-evolving agent ecosystems with automated optimization.

title: AgentEvolver: Towards Efficient Self-Evolving Agent System
snippet: ModelScope project for efficient self-evolving agent systems. 1319 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly addresses efficient self-evolving agent systems from a major open-source ML platform.

title: Agent0 Series: Self-Evolving Agents from Zero Data
snippet: Framework for self-evolving agents from zero data via tool-integrated reasoning. Combines co-evolution of curriculum and executor agents. 1112 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel zero-data self-evolving agent framework using co-evolutionary curriculum and executor agents.

title: Self-Evolving-Agents
snippet: Repository collecting resources on self-evolving agents. 1005 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Major resource collection on self-evolving agents with high community engagement.

title: Darwin Godel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution of Self-Improving Agents
snippet: Official implementation of DGM that iteratively modifies its own code and validates changes on coding benchmarks. Improved SWE-bench from 20% to 50%. 1976 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Landmark self-improving agent that rewrites its own code through evolutionary search, with strong benchmark results.

title: OpenSpace: Self-Evolving Skill Engine for AI Agents
snippet: Self-evolving skill engine with FIX, DERIVED, and CAPTURED evolution modes. 46% token reduction. Community skill sharing at open-space.cloud.
query: OpenSpace self-evolving skill engine AI agent

metadata.llm_reason: Production-ready self-evolving skill engine with concrete efficiency gains and community sharing.

title: Yunjue Agent: Zero-Start In-Situ Self-Evolving Agent System
snippet: Fully reproducible, zero-start in-situ self-evolving agent system for open-ended tasks. Multi-agent architecture with Manager, Tool Developer, and Executor. 417 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Zero-start self-evolving agent with in-situ learning and multi-agent architecture.

title: MemSkill: Learning and Evolving Memory Skills for Self-Evolving Agents
snippet: Reframes memory operations as learnable and evolvable memory skills. Uses controller for skill selection and designer for periodic skill evolution. 381 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel approach treating memory operations as evolvable skills for self-evolving agents.

title: MemGen: Weaving Generative Latent Memory for Self-Evolving Agents
snippet: Generative latent memory approach for self-evolving agents. 342 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Memory-focused self-evolving agent framework using generative latent memory.

title: MemRL: Self-Evolving Agents via Runtime Reinforcement Learning on Episodic Memory
snippet: Optimizes memory usage policy via non-parametric RL. Intent-Experience-Utility triplet structure with Two-Phase Retrieval. 71 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel RL-based approach to self-evolution through optimized episodic memory usage.

title: MUSE: Experience-Driven Self-Evolving Agent for Long-Horizon Tasks
snippet: Hierarchical Memory Module enabling continuous learning. SOTA on TAC benchmark at 51.78%. Experience is LLM-agnostic and transferable. 85 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Experience-driven self-evolving agent with transferable memory and strong benchmark results.

title: ELL-StuLife: Self-Evolving Agent via Experience-Driven Lifelong Learning
snippet: Experience-driven lifelong learning for self-evolving agents. 70 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Lifelong learning approach to self-evolving agents through experience accumulation.

title: Tencent SelfEvolvingAgent: Research from Tencent AI Lab
snippet: Includes WebEvolver (EMNLP 2025), WebCoT, and Cognitive Kernel-Pro. Research on coevolving world models for web agents. 87 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Industry research from Tencent AI Lab on self-evolving agents with published conference papers.

title: MetaAgent: Toward Self-Evolving Agent via Tool Meta-Learning
snippet: Self-evolving agent through tool meta-learning with self-reflection, answer verification, and autonomous tool building. 44 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Tool meta-learning approach to self-evolving agents with autonomous capability building.

title: MOLTRON: Self-evolving Agents That Learn and Evolve Skills Autonomously
snippet: Self-evolving agents that upgrade to learn and evolve skills autonomously. 52 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Autonomous skill evolution framework for self-evolving agents.

title: DSPy: The Framework for Programming—Not Prompting—Language Models
snippet: Declarative framework with automatic prompt optimization. Optimizers include COPRO, MIPROv2, SIMBA. Raises ReAct agent scores from 24% to 51%. 33298 stars.

metadata.llm_reason: Major self-optimizing LLM framework that automatically improves prompts and agent pipelines.

title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
snippet: First LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent in Minecraft. Ever-growing skill library, automatic curriculum, iterative prompting. MIT License.

metadata.llm_reason: Foundational open-ended learning agent with self-evolving skill library, seminal work in the field.

title: ADAS: Automated Design of Agentic Systems
snippet: Meta Agent Search that iteratively programs new agents in code. ICLR 2025. Improved F1 by 13.6 points and math accuracy by 14.4%.

metadata.llm_reason: Automated agent architecture search framework — directly evolves agent designs through meta-search.

title: AgentSquare: Automatic LLM Agent Search in Modular Design Space
snippet: Modular design space abstracting agents into Planning, Reasoning, Tool Use, Memory modules. Module evolution and recombination. 17.2% avg gain over hand-crafted agents.

metadata.llm_reason: Automatic agent architecture search through modular evolution, directly relevant to self-evolving agents.

title: OPRO: Large Language Models as Optimizers (Google DeepMind)
snippet: Official code for using LLMs to optimize prompts. Foundational work on LLM self-optimization.

metadata.llm_reason: Foundational work from DeepMind on LLMs as self-optimizers for prompts.

title: A Survey of Self-Evolving Agents: What, When, How, and Where to Evolve
snippet: First systematic survey of self-evolving agents organized around what, when, and how to evolve. Addresses LLM limitations in open-ended environments. Last revised January 2026.

metadata.llm_reason: Definitive survey paper on self-evolving agents covering the full taxonomy of the field.

title: A Comprehensive Survey of Self-Evolving AI Agents: Bridging Foundation Models and Lifelong Agentic Systems
snippet: Comprehensive survey exploring agent evolution techniques that enhance agent systems based on interaction data and environmental feedback.
query: self-evolving autonomous AI agent research meta-learning

metadata.llm_reason: Major survey bridging foundation models with lifelong self-evolving agent paradigm.

title: Self-Improving LLM Agents at Test-Time
snippet: Explores test-time self-improvement methods to create more effective and generalizable agentic LMs on-the-fly.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel test-time self-improvement approach for LLM agents without retraining.

title: SAGE: Reinforcement Learning for Self-Improving Agent with Skill Library
snippet: Skill Augmented GRPO for self-Evolution. Sequential Rollout with skill-integrated reward. 8.9% higher goal completion, 26% fewer steps, 59% fewer tokens.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel RL framework integrating skill libraries for agent self-evolution with strong efficiency gains.

title: Experiential Reflective Learning for Self-Improving LLM Agents
snippet: Self-improvement framework enabling rapid environment adaptation through experiential learning. 7.8% improvement over ReAct baseline on Gaia2.

metadata.llm_reason: Recent self-improvement framework through experiential reflective learning with benchmark improvements.

title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
snippet: Verbal reinforcement learning without weight updates. Episodic memory buffer for self-reflection. +22% on AlfWorld, +20% on HotPotQA, +11% on HumanEval.

metadata.llm_reason: Foundational self-improving agent framework using verbal reflection instead of gradient updates.

title: STOP: Self-Taught Optimizer - Recursively Self-Improving Code Generation
snippet: Framework for recursively self-improving code generation. Seed improver improves itself. Strategies include beam search, genetic algorithms, simulated annealing. COLM 2024.

metadata.llm_reason: Core recursive self-improvement framework where the optimizer improves its own optimization code.

title: Promptbreeder: Self-Referential Self-Improvement Via Prompt Evolution
snippet: Evolves both task-prompts and mutation-prompts in a self-referential way. Outperforms OPRO on GSM8K (83.9% vs 80.2%).

metadata.llm_reason: Self-referential prompt evolution system that improves both prompts and the mutation operators.

title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
snippet: First LLM-powered lifelong learning agent. Automatic curriculum, ever-growing skill library, iterative prompting. 3.3x more unique items than prior SOTA.

metadata.llm_reason: Seminal work on open-ended embodied agent with self-evolving skill accumulation.

title: Darwin Godel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution of Self-Improving Agents
snippet: AI that improves itself by rewriting its own code. SWE-bench 20% to 50%. Uses foundation models to propose improvements and open-ended search for diverse agents. Sakana AI.

metadata.llm_reason: Landmark work on open-ended self-improvement through code self-modification.

title: ExpeL: LLM Agents Are Experiential Learners
snippet: Agent that autonomously gathers experiences and extracts knowledge without parametric updates. Forward transferability from source to target tasks. AAAI 2024.

metadata.llm_reason: Foundational experiential learning framework for self-improving LLM agents without weight updates.

title: Agent0: Unleashing Self-Evolving Agents from Zero Data via Tool-Integrated Reasoning
snippet: Co-evolution between curriculum agent and executor agent from zero data. +18% on math, +24% on general reasoning for Qwen3-8B-Base.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel zero-data self-evolving framework using co-evolutionary dynamics between agents.

title: Yunjue Agent Tech Report: Zero-Start In-Situ Self-Evolving Agent System for Open-Ended Tasks
snippet: Fully reproducible zero-start in-situ self-evolving agent. Multi-agent architecture. SOTA on DSQA, FSC, and xSciQA.

metadata.llm_reason: Zero-start self-evolving agent with reproducible results and multi-agent architecture.

title: MemRL: Self-Evolving Agents via Runtime Reinforcement Learning on Episodic Memory
snippet: Non-parametric RL on episodic memory. Intent-Experience-Utility triplet with Two-Phase Retrieval. Outperforms baselines on HLE, BigCodeBench, ALFWorld.

title: MemSkill: Learning and Evolving Memory Skills for Self-Evolving Agents
snippet: Reframes memory as learnable skills. Controller selects skills, executor produces memories, designer evolves skill set through hard-case review.

title: MetaAgent: Toward Self-Evolving Agent via Tool Meta-Learning
snippet: Learning-by-doing paradigm with continual self-reflection, answer verification, and autonomous tool building from tool-use history.

title: Self-Rewarding Language Models
